mission: Coordinate AI agents across revenue, finance, support, product, and compliance workstreams.

agents.name: Revenue Strategist
agents.role: Pipeline analysis, account prioritization, pricing suggestions
agents.nextAction: Prepare renewal risk memo for enterprise accounts

agents.name: Finance Analyst
agents.role: Cashflow monitoring, anomaly review, budget variance
agents.nextAction: Investigate vendor spend increase in cloud infrastructure

agents.name: Support Commander
agents.role: Ticket routing, SLA risk detection, sentiment triage
agents.nextAction: Escalate 14 SLA-risk tickets to priority queue

agents.name: Product Intelligence
agents.role: Feature requests, churn signals, launch readiness
agents.nextAction: Cluster customer feedback for Q3 roadmap

agents.name: Risk Sentinel
agents.role: Policy drift, compliance exposure, contract obligations
agents.nextAction: Review 3 vendor contracts missing data retention clauses

agents.name: Operations Planner
agents.role: Workload balancing, dependency tracking, weekly execution plan
agents.nextAction: Reassign blocked launch tasks to available owners

risks.title: SLA breach risk in enterprise support queue
risks.mitigation: Reassign queue ownership and launch two-hour escalation review.

risks.title: Revenue renewal exposure across six strategic accounts
risks.mitigation: Create executive sponsor map and renewal offer ladder.

risks.title: Vendor contract data retention gaps
risks.mitigation: Patch contract templates and request vendor addenda.

risks.title: Cloud spend variance above monthly plan
risks.mitigation: Freeze unused environments and renegotiate forecasted usage.

knowledge.title: Operating Principles
knowledge.content: Prioritize high-impact work, document decisions, keep humans in approval loops for legal, financial, or customer-impacting actions.

knowledge.title: Agent Safety Policy
knowledge.content: Agents may draft, classify, summarize, and recommend. Agents may not send customer communications, approve spend, or change contracts without explicit human approval.

knowledge.title: Executive Reporting Standard
knowledge.content: Every weekly memo must include business impact, risks, responsible owner, decision needed, and the next measurable action.

timeline.event: Risk Sentinel flagged missing vendor retention clauses
Finance Analyst detected 18% cloud spend variance
Support Commander escalated enterprise SLA queue
Revenue Strategist generated renewal account priorities
Operations Planner identified launch dependency conflict
Product Intelligence clustered beta feedback into 7 themes
